input.command:
grep -E "w:ins |w:del " temp_eval_ref/word/document.xml | head -20; python -c "
import re
with open('temp_eval_ref/word/document.xml', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()
ins = re.findall(r'<w:ins\b[^>]*>', content)
dels = re.findall(r'<w:del\b[^>]*>', content)
authors = re.findall(r'<w:(?:ins|del)\b[^>]*w:author=\"([^\"]+)\"', content)
from collections import Counter
print('ins count:', len(ins))
print('del count:', len(dels))
print('authors:', Counter(authors))
"
input.description: Analyze tracked changes in reference document

python -c "
import re
with open('temp_eval_check/word/document.xml', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()
ins = re.findall(r'<w:ins\b[^>]*>', content)
dels = re.findall(r'<w:del\b[^>]*>', content)
authors = re.findall(r'<w:(?:ins|del)\b[^>]*w:author=\"([^\"]+)\"', content)
from collections import Counter
print('ins count:', len(ins))
print('del count:', len(dels))
print('authors:', Counter(authors))
"
# also check comment text
grep -o 'Reviewed by agent[^<]*' temp_eval_check/word/comments.xml 2>/dev/null
